overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas showing the character CJ walking along a coastal pier at sunset. The character walks from a Ferris wheel area along the wooden boardwalk to the pier's end, turns to view the sunset over the ocean, then walks back transitioning onto a paved road with food stalls and festive decorations.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier with Ferris wheel amusement structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pier away from the Ferris wheel toward the open water end

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction along the pier

entered.detail: large white metal amusement ride structure with support beams
wooden plank walkway with metal railings along the water
calm sea water reflecting the sunset colors
distant urban buildings and skyscrapers along the coast
tropical palm trees lining the beach area

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden pier at sunset, passing the Ferris wheel structure on the left with the ocean on the right. The city skyline is visible in the distance ahead, and a few pedestrians walk in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier terminus with panoramic ocean sunset view

events.description: character reaches the end of the pier and turns around to face the city and setting sun
camera faces directly toward the bright sunset over the ocean horizon

agents.ego_description: stopping at the pier's end and turning around to view the sunset and city skyline behind

entered.detail: orange and yellow sunset glow over the ocean water

segments.scene_description: At the end of the pier, the character turns to face the open ocean and the setting sun. The Ferris wheel is now behind, and the city skyline is visible in the opposite direction against the warm sunset colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier with overhead festive banner decorations

events.description: passing under strings of colorful triangular festive banners strung overhead

agents.ego_description: walking back along the pier toward the city, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera on the pier

entered.detail: strings of colorful triangular flags hanging overhead across the pier
tall lamp posts with glowing lights along the pier railing
the Ferris wheel structure visible again in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: Walking back toward the city along the wooden pier, the character passes under festive banner decorations and street lamps. Other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and the Ferris wheel becomes visible again in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved boardwalk with food vendors and street traffic

events.description: transitioning from wooden pier planks to paved asphalt road surface
yellow taxi cab drives past on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved road next to the pier, passing food stalls and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past on the road parallel to the pier

entered.detail: asphalt road surface with yellow dividing lines
colorful food vendor stall with checkered pattern and signage
tree-covered mountain or large hill in the background
park bench along the side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the wooden pier onto a paved road running parallel to the waterfront. Food stalls line the left side, festive banners hang overhead, and a yellow taxi passes by on the road. The environment transitions from the pier to a more urban boardwalk setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal pier that transitions from a scenic sunset walk to a bustling urban boardwalk. It begins with the character walking along a wooden pier past a Ferris wheel and pedestrians, moving toward a distant city skyline under a warm sunset. As the character reaches the end of the pier, the camera turns to face the open ocean and the setting sun before pivoting back toward the city. The scene then shifts as the character walks back under festive banners and street lamps, eventually moving from the wooden planks onto a paved road. Finally, the environment opens into a lively boardwalk setting lined with food stalls and passing yellow taxis.
